underlying_goal: Refactor orchestration system into per-operation WorkerDefinitions (Phases 4-7), clean up dead code, and enforce architectural conventions via validation
friction_detail: Claude made architecture-violating commits (moving workers to module root), misunderstood naming conventions requiring bulk renames, added class references before imports causing linter issues, and started making unsolicited edits.
brief_summary: User wanted a large multi-phase refactoring of orchestration into per-operation workers with dead code cleanup and validation enforcement; mostly achieved after significant friction from naming mistakes, architecture violations, and import ordering issues.
